chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No.S- 229 of 2024. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1.For orders on office objections as flag A. 2.For orders on M.A No. 694/2024. 3.For hearing of main case. 03.3.2025 Mr. Rajib Ali Malano, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Asstt: A.G.. ========== It is claimed by the petitioners that they have purchased land which has stood transferred in their name but the private respondents having kept evil eye on their lands, have been dragging the petitioners in series of false litigation and the official respondents No.4 and 5 are causing harassment to them at the behest of private respondents for which petitioners approached the respondents No.2 and 3 for providing legal protection but to no avail, therefore, they have maintained instant petition. At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioners submits that he will be satisfied if the official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance law and provide protection to the petitioners as and when required by them. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of with directions to the respondents No.4 and 5 not to cause any kind of harassment to the petitioners at the behest of private respondents and act strictly in accordance with law. Respondents No.2 and 3 are directed to provide protection to the petitioners as and when required by them. JUDGE Shabir/PS
